scene.setting: a dark, enclosed space, possibly a treasure chest or a box.

objects.name: jewelry
objects.description: An ornate silver or white gold tiara or circlet with a large dark oval gemstone in the center, smaller teardrop-shaped gems, and intricate filigree work with multiple rows of small clear stones. It is resting on a dark, plush surface, possibly velvet.

visual_objective.visibility_notes: The jewelry is in a close-up shot, clearly visible and well-lit against the dark background.

audio_description: A dramatic, orchestral score with a mysterious and suspenseful tone plays in the background.
